description: Drawing performance conclusions from a shared or thermally throttled machine where background load swamps the signal.
body: Failure mode: benchmarks run on a laptop under other load or a shared CI box with variable neighbors, so measured differences reflect environment noise, not the code change, producing irreproducible conclusions. Detection signals: results differ by run-of-day; CPU frequency scaling or throttling visible; rerun on a quiet host disagrees. Do not treat a single run on a noisy host as authoritative. Safer fallback: pin the environment (governor, isolation), record machine state, repeat runs, and flag environment variance rather than reporting the delta as a real regression or gain.
